title: RMZ Corp International Enterprises is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: RMZ Corp International Enterprises is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at RMZ Corp International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RMZ Corp International Enterprises:
RMZ Corp International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp International Enterprises!
